summary: Matrix source cleaned of clicks and level‑adjusted, delivering good sound; an energetic first set shines while the second set is merely okay and Jerry’s vocals sag on Comes a Time.
review: The recording has been meticulously fixed – clicks and pops were reduced and the left channel was balanced for Diamond Blues and Saturday Night – resulting in a solid matrix sound. Musically the show bursts with energy, especially an excellent first set, though the second set lacks excitement and Jerry’s singing falters on Comes a Time.

ai_rating.rationale: Enthusiastic show review with minor vocal issues and a well‑fixed matrix recording give an overall strong but not flawless impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clicks and pops largely removed; left channel level for Diamond Blues and Saturday Night corrected (+5 dB). Some heavy artifacts remain but overall listening experience is clean.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set maintains high energy without slowing down; second set is competent but unremarkable, with vocal decline on Comes a Time.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals deteriorate noticeably on Comes a Time.
